candidate.summary: Extend mission dashboard compact readback with optional long-run lease, workgraph, checkpoint, return-gate, and final-response fields.
candidate.reason: AO Mission long-run supervision needs Command to provide a compact status line that shows whether ready nodes, lease minimums, checkpoint freshness, or early-return risk still block final response.

expected_behavior: Existing compact mission dashboard output remains unchanged for fixtures without long-run fields.
Long-run dashboard fixtures emit compact_long_run_status and compact_readback_statuses lines.
JSON dashboard readback preserves long-run status fields for downstream Atlas/Mission evidence packets.
Command remains read-only and does not schedule, approve, execute, or mutate work.
risk: Low: additive parsing and output for optional fields behind hasLongRunStatus.
rollback: Revert this branch/PR to remove optional long-run fields and fixture.
